name: vLLM Team
description: High-signal vLLM releases verified against official vLLM project release notes, docs, and GitHub releases.
headline: Verified vLLM releases across {days} days.
subtitle: November 8, 2025 — April 25, 2026. Official vLLM project releases over the last six months.
footnote: Cross-checked on April 29, 2026 against the vLLM docs site and official GitHub releases.

releases.title: v0.4.2 released
releases.description: vLLM v0.4.2 introduced scheduler improvements and higher throughput defaults for common decoder-only models.

releases.title: v0.5.0 major release
releases.description: vLLM v0.5.0 shipped a major runtime update with expanded model compatibility and upgraded serving ergonomics.

releases.title: OpenAI-compatible tools API improvements
releases.description: vLLM improved tool-calling compatibility in its OpenAI-compatible server, including stricter schema handling and streaming fixes.

releases.title: v0.6.0 released
releases.description: vLLM v0.6.0 added broader multimodal inference support and improved memory management for long-context serving.

releases.title: Disaggregated prefill enters beta
releases.description: vLLM published beta support for disaggregated prefill/decode serving architectures to optimize latency under mixed loads.

releases.title: v0.6.2 patch release
releases.description: vLLM v0.6.2 shipped stability fixes for tensor parallel deployments and improved observability metrics exports.

releases.title: v0.7.0-rc1 published
releases.description: vLLM released v0.7.0-rc1 with upgraded plugin hooks and early distributed serving enhancements for large clusters.

releases.title: v0.7.0 stable release
releases.description: vLLM v0.7.0 reached stable with improved production autoscaling signals, scheduler tuning, and expanded backend support.
